summary: Adjusted the opening so chapter 12 enters on Martha's impact rather than Owen kneeling in stonework, keeping the same scene information while separating its opening scaffold from the visible chapter 13 opening. The chapter exit was left intact because it already hands off cleanly into the next chapter's estrangement and undercroft focus.
edits: Reframed the first opening beat around Martha hitting the wall.
Kept Owen's recess position, notebook, and listening posture in the opening paragraph.
Left the chapter ending unchanged because the break with Martha already bridges into chapter 13.
